description:
Tracking demand anomalies is complex but critical for accurate demand forecasting. PredictHQ learned this firsthand. They quickly realised how they weren’t seeking just event data. They were seeking demand intelligence which many businesses could benefit from across the globe and so PredictHQ was born. PredictHQ were driven by the decision to go event-driven allowing for true elasticity; the ability to scale in to zero, and a need to implement production grade solutions quickly. Come hear their story and learn how they architected for global success!

PredictHQ Enhanced Seller Page: https://aws.amazon.com/marketplace/esp/page/b82dc088-06e8-4b0c-9068-42e35f9a099b

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​​​ cloud:
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO

#AWS #AmazonWebServices #CloudComputing #ThisIsMyArchitecture
